title: Fangs of the Wild
writer: William F. Claxton, Orville H. Hampton
actors: Charles Chaplin Jr., Onslow Stevens, Margia Dean
plot: Tad Summers, son of mountain lodge owner Jim Summers, sees Roger Wharton kill his supposed best friend. Tad tells his father, who doesn't believe him, but Linda Wharton, Roger's wife, does and taunts him into a confession. Roger s...
